question.label: Team's bar fuzzy
question.name: This team's bar feels fuzzy — where does that show up most in your work?
question.description: Drills into the specific situations where role expectations feel unclear.

answer: I have mostly stayed in my lane instead of forcing cross-team decisions.

assessment.note: He names a specific clarity-linked pattern: staying in his lane and not forcing cross-team decisions, which signals strong uncertainty about expected Principal scope.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Question pattern
new_queue.name: In the last month, where have you held back from asking a question you had?

new_queue.label: Safety mode
new_queue.name: What makes it easier to stay in execution mode rather than push the decision earlier?

new_queue.label: Early alignment
new_queue.name: What do you usually want to have settled before you bring others in?

new_queue.label: Commitment closer
new_queue.name: What will you do differently on early alignment before we next meet?

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I can describe Principal impact in general, but this team's bar still feels fuzzy.
I have mostly stayed in my lane instead of forcing cross-team decisions.
